title: Farshid
body: AI Vision Architect Architecting Intelligent Perception Technical Product Management & Strategic Consultancy for Embedded AI Vision Systems. Bridging the gap between R&D curiosity and Production-grade AI. Bridging the divide between high-level research and rugged hardware deployment. With a PhD, 3 patents, and 21 publications, I specialize in scaling intelligent perception systems—from medical imaging to autonomous robotics—into reliable, market-ready products. Strategic Solutions & Case Studies
